events.rationale: Increase PEG Model Activation Edge Count by 2 to inject dependency load elevation. Affects SIG-002 dependency_edge_count (15→17) and dependency_load_ratio (0.682→0.773), propagating through COND-001 → DIAG-001 → INTEL-001.
events.reproducibility_note: Deterministic: VAR_ST_013=5, all other static variables unchanged. SIG-002 formula: dependency_edge_count = VAR_ST_012 + VAR_ST_013 + VAR_ST_014 + VAR_ST_015 = 7+5+2+3 = 17; dependency_load_ratio = 17/22 = 0.773

events.rationale: Increase Pipeline Module Execution Count Per Run from 8 to 14 (+75%). Affects SIG-005 throughput_rate (9/8=1.125 → 9/14=0.643), propagating through COND-004 → DIAG-004 → INTEL-004.
events.reproducibility_note: Deterministic: VAR_AT_005=14. SIG-005 formula: throughput_rate = (VAR_DT_001 + VAR_DT_003) / VAR_AT_005 = (4+5)/14 = 9/14 = 0.643

events.rationale: Inject AT-001 (push-to-main frequency=3) and AT-002 (auto-commit frequency=2) to attempt BLOCKED → ACTIVE transition for INTEL-005 via SIG-003/COND-005/DIAG-005. Both inputs were PENDING in static 40.4 context.
events.reproducibility_note: Deterministic: VAR_AT_001=3, VAR_AT_002=2. ENGINE FINDING: compute_sig_003 second branch (when AT-001/AT-002 provided) still returns state=BLOCKED with output=null. No SIG-003 computation formula exists in v0.1 engine. Transition ATTEMPTED but NOT ACHIEVED — engine architectural limitation recorded.
